title: BRITA MAXTRA PRO Limescale Expert Water Filter Cartridge 3 Pack (New) - Original BRITA Refill for Ultimate Appliance Protection, reducing impurities, Chlorine and Metals (Package May Vary)
features: MAXTRA PRO Limescale Expert has a new look. For a short period of time, you might receive either version of the packaging while stock changes over.
The filter for coffee & tea lovers. Ideal for protecting your appliances and keep them shining
Our best limescale filtration ever: 50% more effective at removing limescale from your tap water than the BRITA MAXTRA PRO Pure Performance cartridge
Enjoy the pure taste: filters chlorine, finest particles (≥ 30 µm) and metals like lead and copper if present in your tap water
More efficient than ever: Filters up to 150L in 4 weeks with every single cartridge - and save up to 150 plastic bottles at the same time
The original water filter: your guarantee for best BRITA filtration.
Our PerfectFit system ensures you a flawless and reliable filtration every time with all BRITA Jugs & BRITA Flow
Included: Replacement pack with 3x original BRITA MAXTRA PRO LIMESCALE EXPERT filter cartridges - each last 150L and are recyclable
